# ENT-9204

A community entity smuggling in the render-only positioning bounds — i.e. a
founding-date-style bar. ADR-GOV-0012 D4 forbids exactly this: the bounds are the
mechanism by which a bar gets drawn, so permitting them on a community entity
would let the view assert a precision the evidence never carried.
